question: Har state ke liye, area type ke hisaab se sub-districts ki sankhya ka breakdown do, state name ke alphabetical order mein sort karo aur phir highest count ke basis pe.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM 
    dim_state ds
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    sub_district_count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS sub_district_count
FROM 
    dim_state ds
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON dd.district_id = dsd.district_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    sub_district_count DESC;

question: 2021 mein, oral pill cycles aur condoms ke distribution ka breakdown area type ke hisaab se do, jahan active distribution ho raha hai, un areas ko pill distribution ke volume ke anusaar rank karte hue.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.type_of_area, 
    SUM(fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_pill_distribution, 
    SUM(fp.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condom_distribution
FROM 
    fact_family_planning fp
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district ds ON fp.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month dm ON fp.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    dy.year_value = 2021 AND fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed > 0 AND fp.condom_pieces_distributed > 0
GROUP BY 
    ds.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    total_pill_distribution DESC;
